model_input:
category.prompt_base

Labels (one JSON field per label below):
 - prop1.name: prop1.description
 - prop2.name: prop2.description

Output format — types show the JSON type for each field; return one JSON object with exactly these keys:
{
  "prop1.name": "boolean",
  "prop2.name": "boolean"
}

Return valid JSON only: a single object with every key above. Use true/false for boolean fields. No markdown fences, no commentary.
